meta.title: Leave-Behind Quote Image | Isaac Plans
meta.description: Create a personalized quote image to send clients after your final expense presentation
meta.keywords: final expense, quote image, Senior Life, leave-behind

finalExpenseLeaveBehind.title: Leave-Behind Quote Image
finalExpenseLeaveBehind.subtitle: Enter a client once—generate Bronze, Silver, Gold, and comparison images to send

agentProfile.title: Agent profile
agentProfile.description: This information appears on every leave-behind image you generate. Set it up once—your name and photo on each download.
agentProfile.logoHint: Shown at the top of every quote image. Cloudinary can auto-crop, sharpen, and remove busy backgrounds.
agentProfile.logoUploadFailed: Could not upload logo. Please try again.
agentProfile.logoRemoveBackground: Remove logo background (recommended for logos on dark cards)
agentProfile.photoHint: Square headshot works best. We auto-enhance lighting via Cloudinary. JPEG, PNG, or WebP, up to 4 MB.
agentProfile.saveFailed: Could not save profile. Please try again.
agentProfile.uploadFailed: Could not upload photo. Please try again.
agentProfile.completeBadge: Profile complete — you can generate images.
agentProfile.setupRequiredHint: Add your name and photo so every quote image shows your branding, not a default.
agentProfile.onboardingTitle: Welcome — set up your agent profile
agentProfile.onboardingDescription: Before creating client quote images, add how you want to appear on every download.
agentProfile.onboardingStep1: Your company logo (we can clean up the background)
agentProfile.onboardingStep4: Optional phone and email on the image footer

clients.title: Saved clients
clients.description: Each saved client includes Bronze, Silver, Gold, and comparison data. Open a package to download or share any image.
clients.empty: No saved clients yet. Enter a quote and tap Save client.
clients.deleteConfirm: Delete this client and all saved quote data?
clients.saveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.
clients.draftRestored: Draft restored from this browser session

phase1.title: 1. Enter Information
phase1.description: Fill in the details collected during your presentation
phase1.prospectNameHint: The person this quote is for
phase1.coverageHint: Natural and accidental death use the same amount (total coverage is twice this on the image).
phase1.monthlyPremiumHint: Enter dollars and cents (e.g. 45.00 or 69.73). Formats to two decimals when you leave the field.
phase1.avoidHint: Names of family or friends who passed without final expense planning
phase1.protectHint: Spouse, kids, or other loved ones they want to protect
phase1.planTypeHint: Choose the underwriting / ROP tier for this quote
phase1.planPreferred: Preferred, Super Preferred, or Standard (no ROP)
phase1.planStandard: Preferred, Super Preferred, or Standard (no ROP)
phase1.presentationTierHint: Match the shareable image to how you presented the options—Bronze, Silver, Gold, or Platinum.

workflow.editingHint: Change your details below, then tap View preview to see the updated image.

phase2.title: 2. Preview & Download
phase2.rop2Years: Return of Premium plus 10% during the first 2 years of coverage
phase2.rop3Years: Return of Premium plus 10% during the first 3 years of coverage

package.title: Client quote package
package.description: Enter the client’s details once. Save the package, then download or share each image when you’re ready.
package.tiersHint: Fill in only the tiers you need. Each tier card downloads when that row has valid coverage. The comparison image needs all three tiers.
package.tierValidation: Enter a valid coverage amount (at least $1) for {tier} to download that card.
package.tiersValidationCompare: Enter a valid coverage amount (at least $1) for Bronze, Silver, and Gold to download the comparison image.
package.compareRequiresAllTiers: Complete coverage for Bronze, Silver, and Gold before downloading the comparison image.
package.tierIncompleteHint: Add coverage (at least $1) for this tier to download this card.
package.sharedHint: Plan type, emotional story, and comparison highlight apply to every download.
package.previewHint: Choose an image below, then download or share. Switch tiers without re-entering data.

compare.phase1Description: Enter coverage and monthly premium for Bronze, Silver, and Gold. Choose which plan to highlight on the landscape image.
compare.prospectNameHint: Shown at the top of the comparison when provided
compare.highlightHint: That column is emphasized on the comparison image.
compare.imageStyleHint: Change highlight and download again without re-entering all fields.
compare.validationTier: Enter a valid coverage amount (at least $1) for {tier}.
compare.sharedDetailsTitle: Details shared by all three plans
compare.sharedDetailsHint: These appear once on the comparison image (not repeated in each column).

meta.title: Client Quote Images for Final Expense Agents | Isaac Plans
meta.description: Create branded Bronze, Silver, Gold, and comparison images in minutes. Enter the client once, download or share every tier—built for agents after the kitchen-table presentation.
meta.keywords: final expense leave-behind, quote image generator, agent tools, Senior Life, bronze silver gold

landing.heroSubtitle: Enter your client once. Download Bronze, Silver, Gold, and a side-by-side comparison—each branded with your photo, logo, and contact info. Ready to text before you reach the driveway.
landing.ctaHint: Use your Isaac Plans agent account
landing.trustLine: Built for licensed final expense agents
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need after the presentation
landing.featuresSubtitle: Stop rebuilding slides in Canva between appointments. One workflow, four share-ready images.
landing.feature1Body: Fill in coverage and premium once per tier. Download or share each card—or the full comparison—when the client is ready.
landing.feature2Body: Upload your headshot and company logo once. Every image shows your name, title, phone, and email—professional and consistent.
landing.feature3Body: Packages save as you type. Reopen any saved client later and download a different tier without starting over.
landing.feature4Body: Full bilingual interface so you can serve families in the language they prefer.
landing.howSubtitle: Three steps from sign-in to send
landing.step1Body: Add your photo, logo, and contact details—one time.
landing.step2Body: Enter prospect name, tier amounts, plan type, and emotional story fields.
landing.step3Body: Generate previews, pick Bronze, Silver, Gold, or Compare, then send via text or email.
landing.finalTitle: Your next client deserves a polished follow-up
landing.finalSubtitle: Sign in to create your first package in under five minutes.
landing.finalCta: Sign in — it's free for agents
